Document:
# Core Rule 0 - Players must be above the age of 16
While it is not expected of everyone to act like they’re working in a corporate office job, we reserve the right to make assumptions based off of player behavior if someone is under 16 or behaving sufficiently so, and ban based off of this.
## Examples
### Permitted
- Being 16-777 years old.
### Not Permitted
- A 15 year old admitting in OOC they are not 16
- A user displaying consistent childish behavior.
